items.title: BBC joins paramedics on duty in Lebanon after Israeli strikes
items.dek: BBC Middle East correspondent Hugo Bachega joins paramedics on duty in Nabatieh - a city that was once vibrant, but is now abandoned.
items.body: BBC Middle East correspondent Hugo Bachega joins paramedics on duty in Nabatieh - a city that was once vibrant, but is now abandoned.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Hungary's next PM would pick up if Putin calls and tell him to stop Ukraine war
items.dek: Russia has offered "pragmatic" relations, but Péter Magyar says he will not call Vladimir Putin himself.
items.body: Russia has offered "pragmatic" relations, but Péter Magyar says he will not call Vladimir Putin himself.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Spanish PM's wife charged with corruption after two-year probe
items.dek: Begoña Gómez is accused of using her relationship with Pedro Sánchez to advance her private career.
items.body: Begoña Gómez is accused of using her relationship with Pedro Sánchez to advance her private career.
